title: IIITDM Kancheepuram
meta_description: A Unique Institute specialized in Design-centric Engineering.

(EN24D0001) has received the British Council, India Travel and Accommodation Grant to attend the 9th AINET International Conference, scheduled on 16â17 January 2026 in Sonipat (Delhi-NCR), India. Ms. Malar Maria Ancy A (PHY21D0001) has won the Best Oral Presentation Award at the National Conference on Functional Materials â 2025, held at SRM University, Chennai. Dr.B.Chitti Babu has joined the Editorial Board Member of Electric Power Systems Research, Elsevier (I.F:4.2, Q1)". Dr. Priyanka Kokil has received Best Researcher and Publication Award for year 2024 from IEEE Madras Section Dr. Rajnish Mallick has been selected for Scientific High Level Visiting Fellowships (SSHN) 2025, awarded by the French Insitute of India, Embassy of France Dr. Anushree Khandale has been elected as a Member of the Insitute of Physics View More View More Current Events Refresher Course on Machine Learning and Optimization Techniques from 16th - 28th March 2026. 2nd Summer School on Medical Imaging 2026 (SuSMI '26) June 15-19, 2026 One Day Workshop on Bioinformatics and Healthcare: Concepts, Tools and Applications (27 February, 2026) One Day Hands-on Training Program on âMicro-engineered Superhydrophobic Surfaces: Fabrication and Characterizationâ at IIITDM Kancheepuram (07th March, 2026) SPARC Sponsored Workshop on Software Hardware Co-Design (SPARC-SwHwCoD) (17â23 December 2025 | Hybrid Mode (In-Person + Online)) SPARC Sponsored Workshop on In-Memory Computing (SPARC-IMC ) (10â16 December 2025 | Hybrid Mode (In-Person + Online)) 5 Day Short Term Course on Design and Analysis of Algorithms (Nov 29 to Dec 3, 2025) (HYBRID MODE) 5 Day Short Term Course on Theory of Computation (Dec 8 to Dec 12, 2025) (HYBRID MODE) MMTTC Offline Refresher Course on "Cutting-Edge Innovations in Wearable Technology Devices."
